data.title: From Bitcoin to SEI: 21Shares Expands Its ETF Ambitions
data.description:
21Shares has filed with the SEC to launch a spot SEI ETF, joining Canary Capital in a race to bring the first SEI-focused fund to market.

The post From Bitcoin to SEI: 21Shares Expands Its ETF Ambitions first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/08/29/race-to-launch-sei-etf-heats-up-21shares/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=race-to-launch-sei-etf-heats-up-21shares

data.title: Suzaku Secures $1.5 Million Funding to Enhance Decentralization on Avalanche
data.description: According to PANews, Suzaku, a decentralized hub on the Layer 1 blockchain, Avalanche, has successfully raised $1.5 million through seed rounds, public sales, and grants. Suzaku aims to assist Avalanche's Layer 1 nodes in securely expanding and decentralizing their validator set. The protocol addresses a critical infrastructure gap within the Avalanche ecosystem by providing a structured path for Layer 1 nodes to transition from centralized validation to a fully permissionless decentralized system.

data.title: Tether leads as crypto borrowing soars to $44 billion in record quarter
data.description:
Borrowing activity in crypto markets accelerated sharply in the second quarter of 2025, according to new figures from Galaxy Research. The study found that loans backed by digital assets across DeFi protocols climbed to a record $26. 47 billion, up 42. 1% from the previous quarter
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tether-leads-as-crypto-borrowing-soars-to-44-billion-in-record-quarter/

data.title: Solana's Zeus Network Achieves Record Bitcoin Inflow Amid Strategic Partnership
data.description: According to PANews, Solana's Zeus Network has recorded its largest single Bitcoin inflow, amounting to 100 BTC, bringing its total value locked (TVL) to 426 BTC. This development follows Zeus Network's announcement of a strategic partnership with Metalpha, highlighting Solana's emergence as a pivotal hub for institutional digital assets. Zeus Network continues to enhance its infrastructure, actively attracting institutional-grade Bitcoin liquidity to bolster the Solana Bitcoin DeFi ecosystem.

data.title: Gucci Now Accepts Cryptocurrency Payments in Select U.S. Stores
data.description: According to PANews, luxury brand Gucci has begun accepting cryptocurrency payments, including Ethereum (ETH) and Dogecoin (DOGE), at select stores in the United States. This move marks a significant step in the integration of digital currencies into mainstream retail, offering customers more diverse payment options. Gucci's decision to embrace cryptocurrencies reflects the growing trend of luxury brands exploring digital assets as a means to attract tech-savvy consumers and enhance the shopping experience.
